sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106032" key="*turrhnikourgh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τυρρην-ικουργής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n106032.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of Tyrrhenian</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Etruscan work</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.93</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
